name: ExtensionConditionDefinition_Medication
title: R5: Medications particularly relevant for this condition (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ConditionDefinition.medication` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ConditionDefinition.medication` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ConditionDefinition.medication` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ConditionDefinition.medication` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ConditionDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ConditionDefinition.medication` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

binding.description: A coded concept identifying the category of medication request.  For example, where the medication is to be consumed or administered, or the type of medication treatment.
